summary: AI Suggestions & Cover Image Generation testing complete. 24/25 backend tests passed (96% - 1 transient network error). All frontend features verified: SeriesTimeline shows cover image in sidebar, 'Regenerate Cover' button visible, AI Suggestions return 4 character-specific suggestions (Jasper, Luna, Roo) referencing story elements. ResumeYourStory card shows cover thumbnail from R2 storage replacing BookOpen icon.

minor.issue: One test had transient network error (RemoteDisconnected) - not a code bug, connection issue during parallel requests

critical_code_review_comments: story_series.py lines 665-770: suggestions endpoint correctly fetches char_bible, world_bible, recent_eps, story_memory and builds ~4000 char context for LLM
story_series.py lines 686-702: Character context includes name, role, personality_traits, goals, backstory, relationships
story_series.py lines 705-713: World context includes world_name, setting_description, lore, locations
story_series.py lines 717-725: Recent episode summaries with cliffhangers included in context
story_series.py lines 729-738: Memory context includes open_loops, pending_hooks, character_states, canon_events
story_series.py lines 1310-1400: generate-cover endpoint builds prompt from series data, generates via gpt-image-1, uploads to R2
story_series.py lines 1326-1334: Cover prompt includes main character appearances, world setting, genre, style
SeriesTimeline.js lines 45-46: generatingCover state, line 206-218: handleGenerateCover function
SeriesTimeline.js lines 260-270: Generate Cover button shows 'Regenerate Cover' if cover_asset_url exists
SeriesTimeline.js lines 467-475: cover-image-zone renders img with cover_asset_url in sidebar
ResumeYourStory.jsx lines 121-127: SeriesCompulsionCard shows cover_asset_url as thumbnail if exists, else BookOpen icon

success_rate.backend: 96% (24/25 pytest tests passed - 1 transient network error)

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with Fox Forest series that has cover_asset_url
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fox Forest series (ea2bc4e8-454d-4f40-8415-f4383593904a) has cover_asset_url generated. Suggestions endpoint returns contextual suggestions referencing characters Jasper, Luna, Roo and story-specific elements (Magic Fox Forest, Crystal Pond, forest spirit). Cover generation takes 20-30 seconds via gpt-image-1.

POST_suggestions_returns_200.evidence: Returns 200 with 4 suggestions for authenticated user

suggestions_reference_characters.evidence: All 4 suggestions reference Jasper, Luna, or Roo by name

suggestions_not_generic.evidence: Suggestions include story-specific elements: Magic Fox Forest, Mysterious Crystal Pond, forest spirit, ancient rival

suggestions_have_4_directions.evidence: Returns continue, twist, stakes, custom direction types

GET_series_has_cover_asset_url.evidence: GET /api/story-series/{id} returns cover_asset_url field with valid R2 URL

GET_my_series_has_cover_asset_url.evidence: GET /api/story-series/my-series returns cover_asset_url for each series

SeriesTimeline_cover_image_display.evidence: Cover image displayed in sidebar with aspect-[2/3] ratio

SeriesTimeline_regenerate_cover_button.evidence: Button shows 'Regenerate Cover' text when cover_asset_url exists

ResumeYourStory_cover_thumbnail.evidence: Fox Forest card shows cover image thumbnail from R2 storage

AI_suggestions_zone_displays_suggestions.evidence: 4 suggestions displayed with titles: The Cracking Branches, The Betrayal of the Guardian, The Race Against Time, A Fox's Dream
